p57_phase: P57 — Monitoring Contract V2 Annotation Integration

p52_contract_recap.scope: Tier C games: |sp_fip_delta| >= 0.5, market_home_prob_no_vig in (0,1), home_win defined. Total n=535 (2025 season).
p52_contract_recap.note: P52 owns global calibration monitoring. Band-level annotations (P56/P57) are metadata only. P57 does not add runtime monitoring or change P52 thresholds.

annotation_metadata_schema.description: Schema for attaching band-level diagnostic annotations to monitoring reports. These records are metadata only and do not affect P52 global monitoring status or runtime recommendation logic.

annotation_scope.description: Scope of the annotation; BAND_LEVEL for sp_fip_delta sub-bands.

metric_family.description: Metric domain this annotation belongs to.

band_n.description: Number of games in this band for the reporting period.

sample_tier.description: Sample size tier per P56 policy.

annotation.description: Annotation label for the band finding.

evidence_strength.description: Evidence strength level for this annotation.

platt_ece.description: Platt-calibrated ECE for this band in the reporting period.

raw_ece.description: Raw (uncalibrated) model ECE for this band.

ece_delta.description: platt_ece minus raw_ece. Positive = Platt worsened ECE in this band.

repeated_month_count.description: Number of separate months this band has shown elevated ECE.

cumulative_band_n.description: Total games in this band across all monitored months.

future_evidence_required.description: Whether future evidence is required before any action escalation.

should_change_global_status.description: Whether this annotation should change P52 global monitoring status.

should_trigger_refit.description: Whether this annotation should trigger a model refit.

should_change_thresholds.description: Whether this annotation should change P52 global thresholds.
should_change_thresholds.constraint: MUST always be false for band-level annotations alone.

invariants: should_change_global_status MUST be false when sample_tier=BAND_SAMPLE_INSUFFICIENT.
should_trigger_refit MUST be false when n < 30.
should_change_thresholds MUST be false for all band-level annotations.
Band annotations are additive metadata only; they do not replace P52 status fields.
Records must preserve trace to source phase (e.g., p55_reference, p56_reference).

global_vs_band_status_separation.separation_principle: P52 global monitoring status is governed by P52 V2 thresholds. Band-level annotations (P56, P57) are diagnostic metadata only. They coexist in monitoring reports without overriding global status.

rules.rule: Global monitoring status is controlled exclusively by P52 V2 thresholds.
rules.implication: A band anomaly cannot change global status unless P52 thresholds are triggered.

rules.rule: Band annotation does not override global status unless future evidence requirements are met.
rules.implication: P55 Sep mid-band finding (n=27, SAMPLE_SENSITIVE_BAND_ANOMALY) leaves global status as P52_MONITORING_CONTRACT_V2_READY_DIAGNOSTIC.

rules.rule: Band annotations appear in reports as warning metadata sections, clearly labelled.
rules.implication: Reports must distinguish 'GLOBAL STATUS' from 'BAND ANNOTATIONS' sections.
Sep 2025 1.00-1.25 band (n=27) → no refit, regardless of ECE value.
Even if platt_ece=0.246 in the Sep mid-band, P52 global ECE thresholds remain unchanged until n >= 100 and multi-month evidence exists.

rules.rule: Band-level annotation records must preserve trace to P55/P56 source evidence.
rules.implication: Each BandAnnotationRecord in a monitoring report must include p55_reference and p56_reference fields pointing to the source JSON artifacts.

sep_2025_mid_band_annotation_carry_forwa.carry_forward_reason: n=27 < 30 (BAND_SAMPLE_INSUFFICIENT). Evidence is insufficient for any action escalation. This record is carried forward into future monitoring reports as TRACK_ONLY metadata until future evidence criteria are met.

required_future_evidence.description: Same band n >= 30 in a future month (Sep 2026 or any month)
Repeat elevated platt_ece in at least 2 separate months within the same band
Cumulative band n >= 100 across all months with ECE CI lower bound > 0.08
required_future_evidence.note: Alternative to FE01+FE02; stronger evidence path

required_future_evidence.description: Platt worsening ece_delta > 0.05 confirmed at n >= 30

sep_2025_mid_band_annotation_carry_forwa.refit_trigger_conditions: Model refit consideration requires: FE01 AND FE02 met, AND explicit senior review, AND paper_only constraints lifted by authorized user.
sep_2025_mid_band_annotation_carry_forwa.current_status: Sep 2025 1.00-1.25 band: FE01 not yet met (n=27 < 30). FE02 not yet met (single month only). No refit warranted.

future_monitoring_report_requirements.description: Future Monitoring Contract V2 reports (monthly or quarterly) must include a BAND ANNOTATIONS section when any active carry-forward records exist.
required_report_sections: GLOBAL STATUS — P52 V2 threshold evaluation (ECE, Brier, edge rate)
BAND ANNOTATIONS — Active carry-forward BandAnnotationRecord list
DATA GAP STATUS — 2024 closing-line gap and cross-year analysis status
band_annotation_section_rules: Each BandAnnotationRecord must show sample_tier, annotation, action, n, platt_ece.
Records with sample_tier=BAND_SAMPLE_INSUFFICIENT must be clearly labelled as TRACK_ONLY.
Records must show evidence progress toward future_evidence_required criteria.
The section must explicitly state: 'Band annotations do not change global P52 status.'
The section must state whether should_trigger_refit and should_change_thresholds are false.
future_monitoring_report_requirements.graduation_criteria: A BandAnnotationRecord graduates from TRACK_ONLY to FLAG_FOR_FOLLOW_UP when: band n >= 30 in a subsequent month AND repeated_month_count >= 2. A record graduates to PROMOTE_TO_DRIFT_CANDIDATE_IF_CI_ELEVATED when: cumulative_band_n >= 100 AND ECE CI lower bound > 0.08.
future_monitoring_report_requirements.archival_criteria: A BandAnnotationRecord is archived (removed from active list) when: 6 consecutive months pass without band n >= 10, OR when an explicit senior review concludes no systematic pattern exists.

for_sep_2025_mid_band.description: Evidence required to revisit the Sep 2025 1.00-1.25 band finding.

criteria.description: Same band (1.00 <= |sp_fip_delta| < 1.25) achieves n >= 30 in a future month.
Repeated elevated platt_ece in at least 2 separate months within the same band.
Cumulative band n >= 100 across all months, with ECE CI lower bound > 0.08.
Platt worsening ece_delta > 0.05 confirmed at n >= 30.
criteria.current_status: NOT_MET — n < 30 prevents reliable ece_delta attribution.

for_platt_refit_consideration.description: Evidence required before a future task may consider Platt refit.
minimum_requirements: Global P52 calibration alert triggered (not just band-level).
paper_only constraint lifted by authorized user.
for_platt_refit_consideration.note: None of these conditions are currently met. No Platt refit is warranted or proposed.

for_p52_threshold_change.description: Evidence required before P52 global thresholds may be changed.
minimum_requirements: Multiple global calibration alerts across different months.
Systematic ECE degradation confirmed at Tier C level (n=535 equivalent).
New diagnostic phase P5x completed with evidence.
for_p52_threshold_change.note: P52 thresholds are unchanged and will remain so based on current evidence.

p52_v2_compatibility.statement: P57 does not supersede P52 and does not change P52 thresholds.
details: P57 adds a BandAnnotationRecord schema to the P52 V2 reporting metadata layer.
P52 global monitoring thresholds (Tier C ECE, Brier score, edge rate) remain unchanged.
P57 annotation integration is additive; it does not replace any P52 field.
P57 must not modify runtime recommendation logic.
P57 must not change P45 Platt constants (A=0.435432, B=0.245464).
P57 must not overwrite P52/P53/P54/P55/P56 artifacts.
P57 must not change P52 thresholds.
The Sep 2025 mid-band annotation (SAMPLE_SENSITIVE_BAND_ANOMALY, TRACK_ONLY_NO_REFIT) does not affect P52 global monitoring status.
Future monitoring reports using P57 schema must explicitly state 'Band annotations do not change global P52 status.'

data_gap_status.note: 2024 closing-line data gap (P43_BLOCKED_BY_DATA_GAP) remains unresolved. Cross-year band analysis cannot be completed until 2024 historical odds are obtained. P57 annotation integration applies to 2025 Tier C data only.
